title: everythingEternal
description: Gives eternity to all edible vanilla minecraft items
body:
Ever wish your favorite foods in Minecraft could last forever? With the EverythingEternal mod, that wish becomes reality! This mod brings you the power to make **all vanilla Minecraft foods** eternal, meaning they can be eaten over and over again without ever disappearing from your inventory.

This mod is for **Forge**. NeoForge is not compatible nor Fabric or Quilt. Both are not planned to be implemented.

![EET Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d77a42fb2a56d6dcae2af3ab5d4a20c86f1e07e1.png)

![EET Items-IT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9043f5363bd4058ebcff4bde409f4c6fff1f3fa.png)

![EET Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f93a11daf4cd6d8fc6ae34ce821e7d1eb1c05c8.png)

The first item is the Eternal Core. The Eternal Core is crafted with this recipe and is needed to craft the Eternal Foods.

![EET EternalCore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f8785acc4ee3aeefda0f386727259a5c908028e.png)

The second item is Dark Energy. It is dropped with 5% chance from the warden.

All Eternal Foods are crafted with the same recipe. Only the food changes from recipe to recipe. Example:

![EET EternalSteak](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb617fe691c989501ca9b39a2686ac8d77e1e7e8.png)
